items.briefing:
Education and training organisations like ours should take note of a warning about third-party vendor breaches hitting the education sector hard. When suppliers or service providers we share data with get hacked, our student and staff records can be exposed — even if our own systems are secure. Separately, Australia's communications regulator ACMA has announced its 2026–27 compliance priorities, with a strong focus on protecting consumers from scams and harmful digital practices.

**Practical tip:** Review the list of third-party vendors who have access to your organisation's data and confirm they follow basic security practices — start with anyone who handles student enrolments or personal information.

featured.title: Local Police Collusion Hampers Crackdown on Asian Scam Centers
featured.quote: Police corruption enabling cybercrime scam centers threatens regional economies and law enforcement credibility.
